decision.summary: Close the 66k dip Yes position on stop-loss; no new BTC entry has a valid edge right now.
decision.rationale: The open position `will-bitcoin-dip-to-66k-on-march-28` on `Yes` has fallen to 13.5% probability, which is below the playbook stop-loss threshold of 20%, so it should be exited. This also matches the updated Beecthor thesis: short-term he still sees yesterday’s plan as most probable, with at least a wave 2 retracement likely toward 67.890, 68.653, 69.424, or 70.537 before broader downside risk resumes; Binance spot at 66864.96 supports that rebound scenario more than an immediate fresh dip to 66k. After closing, no new market offers a clean aligned edge: downside dip markets conflict with the near-term retracement thesis, while upside reach markets above price have very low Polymarket consensus and sit well below the preferred range.
